name: YouTube Playlist Videos
summary: Return the videos in a playlist, with optional scroll-pagination to reach deeper entries.
description: Open a YouTube playlist and return the videos it contains with title, channel, duration, and position. Use this to enumerate playlists surfaced by `youtube search` (filter=playlists) or by `youtube channel` (mode=playlists).

limit.description: Max videos to return. Defaults to 50. To reach entries beyond the first lazy-loaded batch (~100), raise this — the workflow scrolls until the limit is met or the list exhausts. Hard cap 200.

playlist_id.description: YouTube playlist id — the `list` query param on a /playlist or /watch URL.

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const id=cleanArg(arg0);if(!id)throw new Error('playlist_id is required');if(!/^(PL|RD|OL|UU|LL|FL)[A-Za-z0-9_-]{6,}/.test(id))throw new Error('playlist_id does not look like a playlist id: '+id);const target='https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list='+encodeURIComponent(id);setTimeout(()=>window.location.assign(target),0);return{redirected:true,target};

steps.name: Wait for at least one row

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const n=parseInt(cleanArg(arg0),10);const limit=Number.isFinite(n)&&n>0?Math.min(n,200):50;const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const abs=(h)=>{if(!h)return'';try{return new URL(h,location.origin).toString();}catch{return String(h);}};const dedupDur=(s)=>{const t=norm(s);if(!t)return'';const half=t.length/2;if(t.length%2===0&&t.slice(0,half)===t.slice(half))return t.slice(0,half);const parts=t.split(' ');if(parts.length>=2&&parts[0]===parts[1])return parts[0];return parts[0]||t;};const listId=new URL(location.href).searchParams.get('list');let lastCount=0;let stall=0;for(let i=0;i<20;i++){const rows=document.querySelectorAll('ytd-playlist-video-renderer').length;if(rows>=limit)break;window.scrollTo({top:document.body.scrollHeight,behavior:'instant'});await sleep(1200);if(rows===lastCount){stall++;if(stall>=3)break;}else{stall=0;}lastCount=rows;}window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'});await sleep(300);const metaBlob=norm(document.querySelector('ytd-playlist-byline-renderer, yt-content-metadata-view-model')?.textContent||'');const vcMatch=metaBlob.match(/([\d,]+)\s*videos?/i);const chLink=document.querySelector('yt-page-header-view-model a[href*="/@"], yt-content-metadata-view-model a[href*="/@"], ytd-playlist-header-renderer ytd-channel-name a');let channel=norm(chLink?.textContent||'');if(/^by\s+/i.test(channel))channel=channel.replace(/^by\s+/i,'').trim();const pl={playlist_id:listId,title:norm(document.querySelector('yt-dynamic-text-view-model h1, .yt-page-header-view-model-wiz__title, ytd-playlist-header-renderer #text')?.textContent||''),channel,total_videos:vcMatch?vcMatch[0]:metaBlob.slice(0,80),url:location.href};const rows=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('ytd-playlist-video-renderer'));const videos=[];for(const el of rows){if(videos.length>=limit)break;const a=el.querySelector('a#video-title, a.yt-simple-endpoint[href*="/watch"]');const href=a?.getAttribute('href');const url=abs(href);let video_id=null;try{video_id=new URL(url,location.origin).searchParams.get('v');}catch{}if(!video_id)continue;const title=norm(el.querySelector('#video-title')?.textContent||a?.getAttribute('title')||'');const channel=norm(el.querySelector('ytd-channel-name a, #channel-name a, .yt-simple-endpoint.ytd-video-meta-block')?.textContent||'');const duration=dedupDur(el.querySelector('ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer, #thumbnail-overlay #text')?.textContent||'');const posEl=el.querySelector('#index, ytd-thumbnail-overlay-playing-video-renderer');const pos=norm(posEl?.textContent||'')||String(videos.length+1);videos.push({position:pos,video_id,title,channel,duration,url});}return{playlist:pl,returned_count:videos.length,videos};

help.summary: Return the videos in a playlist, with optional scroll-pagination to reach deeper entries.

parameters.limit: Max videos to return. Defaults to 50. To reach entries beyond the first lazy-loaded batch (~100), raise this — the workflow scrolls until the limit is met or the list exhausts.
parameters.playlist_id: YouTube playlist id — the `list` query param on a /playlist or /watch URL.

returns: { playlist:{ playlist_id, title, channel, total_videos, url }, returned_count, videos:[ { position, video_id, title, channel, duration, url } ] }.
notes: Private or unlisted playlists load only if the active browser session has access.
Mix/auto-generated playlists (id starts with RD) are allowed but may not expose every entry in the DOM.
Channel name is sourced from the playlist sidebar when available. Per-video channel is omitted for single-channel playlists — YouTube doesn't render a separate byline per row in that case.
